days.label: Push Day ? Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 ? you finally logged Monday and it's a mixed bag. 10/10/8 at RPE 7/8/9. Sets 1 and 2 were solid but set 3 fell short on reps and hit RPE 9 ? that's a wall. No bump. Need 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under across all three sets to earn 135. Pause at the chest, drive through the heels, no bouncing. You're close ? stay disciplined through that third set.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb to 45 ? earned it. 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 last Monday. Clean across the board. 30-degree incline, control the negative, full range of motion. At 45 lbs aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8. Log it.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? you went 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/8. Top of the rep range on all three sets and RPE is clean on sets 1 and 2, but set 3 crept to 8. Need all 3 sets at RPE 7 or under to earn 35. Brace the core, don't lean back, full lockout at the top. You're almost there.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: UP 2 lb to 12 ? you hit 12/12/12 at RPE 6/7/7 last week. Top of the range and RPE was well under the ceiling. Bumping to 12 lb dumbbells (next increment available). Slight bend in the elbows, lead with the elbows not the hands, 2-second hold at the top, slow controlled negative. Log whether the 2-second hold is still happening.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? 10/10/9 at RPE 7/7/9 last week. Set 3 dropped a rep and hit RPE 9 ? same pattern as bench. This is a fatigue issue late in the session, not a strength issue. Need 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under to earn 105. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, full lockout at the top every rep. Manage your energy going into this one.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 ? you established 45 lbs last week with 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/8. Solid baseline. Now push for 12 reps per set. Elbows pinned to your sides, split the rope apart at the bottom, fully extend. RPE 8 is the ceiling ? if you can't hit 12 clean, that's fine, but chase the top of the range.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps ? 5 min

days.label: Pull Day ? Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 ? you went 9/8/8 at RPE 7/7/8 this week. Better than last week's 8/8/8 ? set 1 climbed to 9. You're trending up but not there yet. Need 9-10 reps on all 3 sets at RPE 8 or under to earn 205. Brace hard off the floor, pull through the heels, controlled descent. That extra rep on sets 2 and 3 is right there.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb to 55 ? earned it. 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 this week. Massive improvement from two weeks ago when sets 2 and 3 were dropping off. Clean and consistent. Pull to the hip, squeeze at the top for a full second, slow the negative. At 55, aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8. Each side.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? 10/10/10 at RPE 7/8/9 this week. Top of the range but RPE climbed to 9 on set 3 ? that's too high for a bump. Three weeks in a row now where RPE escalates through the session. Need all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 110. Wide grip on the lat bar, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats at the bottom, no leaning back into a row. Think about resetting your breathing between reps.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 ? first week, mixed log. Set 1 hit 12 at RPE 8, sets 2 and 3 hit 15 at RPE 8. Inconsistent rep counts suggest you found your weight mid-session. Now that you know 55 is in range, standardize: aim for 12-15 across all 3 sets at RPE 7-8. Rope at upper pulley, pull to your face, thumbs point behind you at the end. This is a shoulder health exercise ? don't rush it.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb to 70 ? earned it. 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 this week. That's the cleanest log you've had on curls. No swinging, consistent, well under the RPE ceiling. Full squeeze at the top, slow the negative, elbows stay pinned. At 70, the strict form matters even more ? if RPE jumps, that's your form breaking down.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? rotating out hammer curls this week. Your hammer curl log fell apart: 10/5/5 at RPE 8/9/10 ? that's a collapse, not a session. Dropping hammers for one week to let your forearms and brachialis recover, and bringing in dumbbell pullovers to hit the lats and chest from a stretch position. Lie perpendicular across the bench, DB behind your head, arms slightly bent. Lower slowly until you feel the stretch across your chest and lats, then pull back over. Start at 30 lbs, aim for 10-12 at RPE 7. Log the exact weight and we'll build from here.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back ? 5 min

days.label: Leg Day ? Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 ? no leg day log came in for Friday July 3rd. We asked you to push for 9-10 reps and we have no idea what happened. Same target, same ask: need 9-10 reps across all 3 sets at RPE 8 or under to earn 175. Below parallel, brace your core, drive through the heels. Log it. This is a holiday week excuse at best ? it doesn't become a habit.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 145 ? no log from Friday so no movement. You were sitting at 10/10/10 RPE 7/8/8 two weeks ago ? close but set 3 was still at RPE 8. Need all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 155. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins on the way down. Pick up where you left off.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? no Friday log, no movement. Two weeks ago you went 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8 ? consistent but not at the top of the range. Need 12/12/12 per side to earn 35. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel. You've been capping at 10 ? this week intentionally push past that on every set.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 75 ? no log from Friday. This was the one exercise that earned a bump last week (up from 65) and we still don't know how it went at the new weight. First session at 75 lbs: aim for 10-12 at RPE 7-8. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, squeeze the glutes hard at the top and hold for a full second. Log it.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? no Friday log. Two weeks ago you confirmed 65 lbs with 15/15/15 at RPE 6/6/7 ? that was excellent. We need you to repeat that to establish consistency before moving up. Controlled negative, full range of motion. Don't overthink this one ? you know it works.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? rotating out dead bug this week. You've been doing dead bug for several weeks and two weeks ago set 3 spiked to RPE 9, which means your anti-extension core endurance is getting tested. Switching to hanging leg raises on the pull-up bar to hit the core from a different angle ? this one taxes hip flexors and lower abs under load. Hang from the bar, raise legs until parallel to the floor (or higher if you can), control the descent. No swinging. Start at a rep count you can hit with control ? 10-12 is the target but log where you actually land. We'll build from there.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors ? 5 min
